title: I/O - How Do I?
description:
I/O - How Do I?

I/O - How Do I...?

What kind of I/O can I use?

You can use standard digital I/O and optional expanded digital I/O in the RC700 controller.  You can also add a Fieldbus option that allows you to use the RC700 as a Fieldbus slave.

You can configure the RC700 to act as a remote control slave.  See Remote Control - How Do I...?

How do I use the RC700 in a Fieldbus network?

See How can I use my RC700 as a Fieldbus slave.

How do I simulate I/O?

	Enable Virtual I/O mode to allow simulation.
	  Select System Configuration from the Setup menu, then select
	 the Preferences page.
	  Check Virtual I/O and click Apply.
	Write a task in your program to simulate
	 input action in your project.  Use the Virtual I/O commands SetSw, SetIn,
	 and SetInW to turn inputs on and
	 off.
